findings.title: Trilateration via nearby_candidates_secure

evidence.code: returns ROUND(lat,3) but distance from raw coords
evidence.db: pg_get_functiondef: distance_meters = CAST(st_distance(viewer, raw) AS integer); anon EXECUTE granted

findings.risk: Exact location of any consenting user recoverable by anon attacker via banded distance over fuzzed coords
findings.fix: Band distance to >=100m + 50m floor, compute from fuzzed point; optional REVOKE anon EXECUTE

findings.title: Age-verified profiles with NULL method, no enforcing constraint

evidence.db: 77 rows age_verified_at NOT NULL & method NULL of 228 verified / 306 total; 0 CHECK constraints

findings.risk: UK Online Safety Act exposure: unprovable age verification for 77 users
findings.fix: Triage 77 rows (backfill method or null flag); ADD CHECK age_verified_requires_method

findings.title: 35 RLS-enabled/zero-policy tables protected by flag over open grants

evidence.db: 35 tables RLS-on, 0 policies, all carry GRANT ALL to anon+authenticated; product_orders=27 rows, reentry_tokens=68, marketing_cron_auth holds cron secret

findings.risk: One ALTER..DISABLE RLS or one SECDEF reader from exposing revenue, cron secret, auth tokens
findings.fix: REVOKE grants on secret/auth/log tables; add owner-scoped SELECT policies on revenue tables; decide read-policy on config/doc tables

findings.title: Migration drift 21 tracked vs 323 applied; schema not reconstructable

evidence.db: 323 applied, earliest 20260222060750, latest 20260630173917; ~302 untracked; repo 20260617000000_seed_radio_shows not applied

findings.risk: No recoverable schema source of truth; presence/safety RLS lives only in prod
findings.fix: Commit baseline schema+RLS dump; add CI db diff gate; adopt production-is-truth doctrine

findings.title: 51 SECURITY DEFINER functions with no pinned search_path; 126 anon-executable

evidence.db: 51 prosecdef with proconfig IS NULL; 126 anon EXECUTE

findings.risk: search_path injection / privilege escalation through SECDEF boundary
findings.fix: SET search_path on all 51; prune anon EXECUTE where session required

findings.title: partner schema referenced by D31 does not exist

evidence.db: 14 non-system schemas; no partner; only bespoke is atmosphere(1)

findings.risk: Doctrine asserts an isolation boundary that is not built
findings.fix: Build partner schema isolation OR amend D31 to match reality (Phase 2 doctrine draft)

findings.title: product_orders buyers cannot read their own orders

evidence.db: 27 rows, RLS-on, 0 policies => buyer SELECT blocked via PostgREST

findings.risk: Either intended server-only design or broken order history; undocumented
findings.fix: Add buyer SELECT policy or document service-only

findings.title: user_presence_locations RLS owner-scoped (probe-proven) but untracked

evidence.db: JWT-scoped probe: user B reads user A => 0 rows, 0 coords; 4 owner-scoped policies

findings.risk: policy exists only in prod (see DB-04)

findings.title: Tier pricing consistent; all paid tiers have Stripe price IDs

evidence.db: both tables agree; 4 paid tiers non-null stripe_monthly+annual price IDs
